benefits.description: Have to force the thought that they want to drink, normally only drink socially

side_effects.description: GI issues when combining alcohol with cheat meals while on Reta

protocol_notes: User recommends waiting at least 2 weeks before drinking. When drinking on Retatrutide, user prefers spirits with citrus and light sweetener, avoids beer. Diet must be lean and high protein when consuming alcohol, as combining alcohol with cheat meals causes severe GI issues. User is a home mixologist.
